tools.name: License Audit
tools.description: Identify inactive M365 license holders. Find users who haven't signed in recently and surface recoverable seats.

tools.name: Group Import
tools.description: Bulk-add users to an Entra ID security group from a CSV. Dry-run preview, full audit log, and CSV export.

tools.name: MFA Status Report
tools.description: Audit MFA registration status across your tenant. Surface users with weak or missing authentication methods.

tools.name: Guest Access Audit
tools.description: Review all B2B guest accounts in your tenant — last sign-in, group memberships, and licence assignments.
